Brian F. Connors Esq., Law Office of Brian F. Connors, 415-896-6000, brian@brianconnorslaw.com for Plaintiff Oxypower Inc. dba Occidental Power,
Michael Kang, Esq., WOOD LITIGATION, APC, (415) 247-7900, mkang@woodlitigation.com, for Defendant FRITZ PROPERTY GROUP, INC.

PLAINTIFF OXYPOWER INC. DBA OCCIDENTAL POWER Motion To Compel Further Answers To (1) Requests For Admissions; (2) And Responses To Form Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Fritz Property Group is taken under submission.
